name: evukb
description: EvuKB standalone knowledge base and RAG system.

scripts.dev: bash scripts/ensure-lockfile-sync.sh && docker compose --project-directory . -f deploy/docker-compose.dev.yml up --build
scripts.dev-local-embed: bash scripts/ensure-lockfile-sync.sh && docker compose --project-directory . -f deploy/docker-compose.dev.yml --profile local-embed up --build
scripts.test: pnpm exec tsx scripts/verify-db-test-env.ts && vitest run
scripts.test:ci: pnpm exec tsx scripts/verify-db-test-env.ts --require && vitest run --coverage
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm exec tsx scripts/verify-db-test-env.ts && vitest run --coverage
scripts.up: bash scripts/ensure-lockfile-sync.sh && docker compose --project-directory . -f deploy/docker-compose.dev.yml up --build -d
scripts.verify-dev: pnpm run build && pnpm run test && pnpm exec tsx scripts/verify-api-smoke.ts && pnpm exec tsx scripts/verify-openapi-sdk.ts && docker compose --project-directory . -f deploy/docker-compose.dev.yml config >/dev/null
